title: skopeo: support copy to OSTree storage
body:
Currently blocked on: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/228

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mtrmac I have updated `containers/image` and amended in the patch
why is github always saying branch is out-of-date :confused:

LGTM, for the record.

> why is github always saying branch is out-of-date 😕

Well, because it is? Giuseppe, please rebase on top of current master and we’ll merge.
Of course, I thought it was like the last time in c/image eheh
@mtrmac @runcom I've rebased and pushed the new version
